arts.ttl: Arsenal XI vs Atalanta – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal begin their Champions League campaign with a trip to Bergamo to face Atalanta. It will be a first-ever meeting between Arsenal and Atalanta, as the Gunners look to start their European season with a positive result in the competition’s new-look format. arts.ttl: 20-year-old talent lights up UCL clash in front of watching Arsenal & Manchester United scouts
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United both had scouts present to watch Borussia Dortmund against Club Brugge in the Champions League last night, with English youngster Jamie Gittens undoubtedly stealing the show. arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard injury hint in Mikel Arteta footage suddenly has Arsenal fans hopeful
arts.sum: Arsenal supporters have been given hope about Martin Odegaard, who is facing a lengthy spell on the sidelines after suffering an ankle injury on international duty

arts.ttl: Arsenal urged to show ‘different face’ in Odegaard absence
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has urged Arsenal to show a ‘different face’ in the absence of injured captain Martin Odegaard. The midfielder sustained an ankle injury while representing Norway during the international break and is facing an extended spell on the sidelines. arts.ttl: Arsenal could lose star in January as Italian giants plot £25m transfer move
arts.sum: Arsenal have continued to strengthen their defence and have seen Takehiro Tomiyasu drop down Mikel Arteta's pecking order at the Emirates Stadium and he could be available for transfer

arts.ttl: Arsenal offered Martin Odegaard hope as Norway boss makes fresh injury statement
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta confirmed on Wednesday night that Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard had suffered ankle ligament damage after he was crocked in Norway's recent 2-1 win over Austria during the international break

arts.sum: Arsenal could lose one of their players in the January transfer window with a possible move to Serie A being reported.
